cardeffect.clone: Create a copy of the highest costing card in hand
cardeffect.discarddraw: If this card is discarded, draw 1 card
cardeffect.discarddraw.plural: If this card is discarded, draw {0} cards
cardeffect.discardhealth: If this card is discarded, recover {0} HP
cardeffect.discardmana: If this card is discarded, recover {0} MP
cardeffect.discardpower: If this card is discarded, gain {0} Power Up
cardeffect.discardhighestcost: Discard the highest costing card in hand
cardeffect.discardlowestcost: Discard the lowest costing card in hand
cardeffect.discardxmanaadd: Discard a card, add 1 MP for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.discardxmanaadd.plural: Discard up to {0} cards, add 1 MP for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.discardxprotection: Discard a card, gain 1 Protection for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.discardxprotection.plural: Discard up to {0} cards, gain 1 Protection for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.enchantedonly: Only playable if the owner is Enchanted
cardeffect.inflictrandomburnbleed: Randomly inflict {0} of the following: Bleed, Burn
cardeffect.lowercostsamecard: Lower the cost of this card by {0}
cardeffect.maxindeck: Can hold up to {0} cards named {1} in deck.
cardeffect.powerinhand: Gain power equal to the amount of cards named {1} in hand.
